subtitle: A sweet and funny birthday slot machine made with love from the grandkids.
bigline: Spin for pie, cookies, Golden Girls laughs, and a whole lot of Betty love.
marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Betty's official birthday result.

welcome.title: Welcome to Betty's Birthday Casino
paragraphs: Grandkids built this sweet little slot machine for Betty, the birthday star who always has cookies ready.
Expect homemade apple pie energy, crossword puzzle luck, knitting-level patience, and a few Golden Girls laughs.
Grandpa Frank is here as the official funny audit person, which means every win may be reviewed with love.
welcome.overrideLine: Grandpa Frank may object, but the grandkids already approved the birthday fun.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: No cash prizes today, only sweet birthday bragging rights and family love.

rules: Every prize is family-friendly, funny, warm, and made with love.
Grandpa Frank may audit the results, but he cannot cancel birthday joy.
No cash prizes are included in this game.
Cookies, pie, and hugs are always worth celebrating.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Betty's official birthday result is certified by the grandkids and lovingly inspected by Grandpa Frank.

footer: Made with love for Betty from Grandkids.

claim.template: This birthday prize is a fun family greeting from Grandkids. No cash prize is included.

slots.marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Betty's official birthday result.

prizes.title: Birthday Candle Champion
prizes.msg: Betty wins a full birthday cheer from everyone who knows she deserves the sweetest day.

prizes.title: Cookie Jar Legend
prizes.msg: Betty wins official recognition for always having cookies ready like a true family hero.

prizes.title: Five Minute Visit Bonus
prizes.msg: Betty wins a five minute visit that lovingly turns into three hours, as tradition requires.

prizes.title: Birthday Hug Parade
prizes.msg: Betty wins a parade of hugs, smiles, and birthday love from the people who treasure her.

prizes.title: Homemade Apple Pie Jackpot Warmup
prizes.msg: Betty wins the aroma of homemade apple pie and the power to make everyone suddenly hungry.

prizes.title: Knitting Victory Row
prizes.msg: Betty wins a cozy knitting streak with zero dropped stitches and maximum grandma magic.

prizes.title: Crossword Queen Clue
prizes.msg: Betty wins the final crossword answer before anyone else even finds a pencil.

prizes.title: Grandpa Frank Audit Slip
prizes.msg: Grandpa Frank reviews the spin and confirms Betty is still absolutely allowed to win.

prizes.title: Official Frank Objection Overruled
prizes.msg: Grandpa Frank raises a playful objection, but Emma and Noah vote that Betty wins anyway.

prizes.title: Grandkids Love Prize
prizes.msg: Betty wins a heartfelt reminder that her love, cookies, visits, and kindness mean more than she knows.

prizes.title: Golden Girls Bonus Round
prizes.msg: Betty wins premium couch seating, extra laughs, and a Golden Girls level birthday celebration.

prizes.title: 777 Betty Birthday Jackpot
prizes.msg: Betty wins the top birthday celebration with love from Grandkids, Frank, Emma, and Noah.
